Headphones.name: Sony Premium Headphones
Headphones.desc: Experience the magic of noise cancelling headphones bluetooth technology, ensuring an uninterrupted listening experience free from external disturbances. This unique, distraction-free listening experience sets the Sony WH-1000XM5 apart from other headphones in the market.

Headphones.name: Walker's Razor Slim headphones
Headphones.desc: Protect your ear - Walker's Razor Ear Muffs have an ultra low-profile design featuring extra slim ear cups, for a secure fit; these ear muffs protect against hazardous noises, while still letting you clearly hear everything going on around you.

Headphones.name: Apple AirPods 4
Headphones.desc: Active Noise Cancellation and adaptive audio.

Headphones.name: Gen 2 Gaming Headset
Headphones.desc: REAL-TIME GAME AUDIO CONTROL — Pinpoint enemies with what GamingTrend calls “the biggest cheat code in the industry. 200+ game specific audio presets to choose from.

Headphones.name: Sleep Mask with Bluetooth Headphones
Headphones.desc: 3D Contoured Bluetooth Eye Mask, Bluetooth 5.4 Wireless Connection Earphones, Cool Comfortable Fabric and Perfect Light Block, HD Stereo Sound and Long Battery Life.

Smart Home.name: Amazon Echo Show 5
Smart Home.desc: Alexa can show you more - Echo Show 5 includes a 5.5” display so you can see news and weather at a glance, make video calls, view compatible cameras, stream music and shows, and more.Small size, bigger sound

Smart Home.name: 4K Smart Portable Projector
Smart Home.desc: Stream the latest hit series and blockbuster films right from your projector with webOS, supporting popular platforms like Netflix, Prime Video, Disney plus , YouTube, and Apple TV.

Smart Home.name: Gskyer Telescope
Smart Home.desc: Superior Optics: 400mm(f/5.7) focal length and 70mm aperture, fully coated optics glass lens with high transmission coatings creates stunning images and protect your eyes. Perfect full positive telescope for astronomers to explore stars and moon..

Smart Home.name: Bluetooth Label Printer
Smart Home.desc: Portable, Clear Printing, Easy to Use, Rechargeable, Wireless, Inkless, Text, QR code, Barcode, Materials, Images, Time and Borders, Thanksgiving, Christmas,School, Students,Teacher Supplies.

Smart Home.name: Dual Sensor Gas Leak Detector & Carbon Monoxide Detector
Smart Home.desc: Quick Alert & Dual Alarm System: RV carbon monoxide detectors designed with both sound and flashing light alerts, this detector activates when gas levels reach dangerous thresholds (CO ≥ 150PPM or natural gas ≥ 5%LEL). It emits a loud ≥ 85 dB alarm and flashing red light, alerting you and your family instantly in the event of a leak.

Smart Home.name: Magnetic Levitation Bluetooth Speaker
Smart Home.desc: Developed with levitation technology,the speaker is floating and Spinning in the air. Can continuously play music up to 10 hours.

Smart Home.name: Newentor Weather Station
Smart Home.desc: Newentor temperature&humidity monitor with large color display, which shows comprehensive information: inside outside temperature humidity(max/min, hi/lo), customizable alerts, time/date, alarm clock/snooze, weather forecast (next 8-24 hrs) moon phase, barometric pressure.

Smart Home.name: Portable Tire Inflator
Smart Home.desc: Tire Inflator Portable Air Compressor,4X Faster Inflation,6000mAh Cordless/12V DC 150PSI Air Pump with Digital Pressure Gauge for Car,Motorcycle,Bike,Ball

Smart Home.name: Tire Inflator for Heavy-duty Vehicles
Smart Home.desc: cordless air compressor excels at inflating heavy-duty vehicles quickly, such as pickups, trucks, off-road vehicles, not to mention regular cars, bicycles, balls, pool floats, and air mattresses

Smart Home.name: Viture Luma AR/XR Glasses
Smart Home.desc: Experience a stunning 146″ virtual screen with razor-sharp 1200P clarity — no blurry edges, no compromises.

Smart Home.name: 4K Outdoor Pan/Tilt Wireless Security Camera
Smart Home.desc: Feature-packed with 4K resolution, 360° pan, and 24/7 Time-Lapse Capture all while being maintenance-free with solar-power. This camera has all the features you need to monitor your space.
